sj_publication_titles.value: St. Jude Cloud-a Pediatric Cancer Genomic Data Sharing Ecosystem

link.instructions: This link takes you directly to Genomics Platform within St. Jude Cloud with the specific sample queried. You will need to login to St. Jude Cloud, request the data, fill out the data access agreement (DAA), and once the DAA is approved, you will be vended the data in your DNAnexus project. For more information on how to request data, see our Help Guides at (https://university.stjude.cloud/docs/genomics-platform/requesting-data/making-a-data-request/.
